who: law firm billing administrators processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For law firm billing administrators processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice generation instead of manual invoicing processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual conversion of time entries to invoices is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm billing help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to law firm billing administrators with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among billing admins
try_it: Let users try time entry import on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing time data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
